answer: Zip code 78744 shows the highest combined activity for permits and code violations, with 3,697 permits and 1,781 code violations. Other areas with significant overlap include 78704 (3,547 permits and 1,701 violations) and 78745 (3,127 permits and 1,741 violations). These areas experience notable spikes in both categories.
